title: Background Service Worker + offscreen lifecycle manager
description: Implement entrypoints/background.ts as the MV3 service worker. Responsibilities: event routing, storage orchestration, offscreen document lifecycle (create on demand, destroy when idle), chrome.runtime message hub. Must not store any state in module-level globals — all state persisted to chrome.storage.local. Implement lib/offscreen/ helpers for spawning and messaging the offscreen document. Unit tests for message dispatch and offscreen lifecycle (TDD). Worker must survive idle termination and resume correctly.
